limitations: The composition inherits the finite-scale boundaries of its inputs.
The cross-assembly exact-directional diagnostic is not admitted without an outward transport guard.
Capacity and volume inputs are not yet independent all-level physical estimates.
No uniform Stage A, Hilbert--Polya, zero identification, or Riemann Hypothesis result is claimed.
route_consequence: Every admitted candidate is a separately valid lower bound for q4; taking their maximum preserves validity. The packet-block certificate adds one full-chain 1e-8 support record beyond direct Weyl. The exact-directional diagnostic would add a second, but it is excluded because three threshold-labelled copies of one weak record lack an outward guard between two binary64 Gram assembly paths. On the fine chain all thresholds were already closed.
